历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: In 2022, the lowest rank for science was approximately 12617, which rose sharply to 6150 in 2023, continued to rise to 3457 in 2024, and fell back to 4829 in 2025. Over the past four years, the overall ranking trend first increased and then decreased, with a baseline of about 4829 in 2025, a decrease of about 1372 from 2024. The university's enrollment plan for science (physics category) in Ningxia was 14 students in both 2022 and 2023, reduced to 9 in 2024, rebounded to 13 in 2025, and is planned to remain at 13 in 2026, consistent with 2025, indicating stable enrollment scale.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Northeast Normal University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Main Ranking, it ranks 48th, with recent rankings stable in the 44-53 range, making it a top-tier normal university nationwide. Its 2026 reputation evaluation is slightly positive, with an estimated master's application number exceeding 15,000 and an admission ratio of about 5:1, reflecting high popularity in the field of education. Douyin popularity evaluation is average, with moderate short video exposure, and no significant negative public opinion or enrollment gaps have been recorded. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Marxist Theory, Education, and World History were rated A+, Statistics was rated A, and Ecology and Biology were rated A-, with the number of A-class disciplines ranking among the top among normal universities, strongly attracting candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The social popularity of teacher/education majors shows a trend of divergence and wait-and-see, but the publicly-funded normal student policy of ministry-affiliated normal universities remains attractive. In 2026, the number of physics category candidates in Ningxia is about 44,491, basically unchanged from 2025, indicating a stable competitive landscape.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 4829, the 2026 enrollment plan remaining unchanged, stable candidate numbers, slightly positive university reputation, and the appeal of advantageous disciplines, competition is expected to intensify slightly in 2026, with rankings moving up slightly. The predicted minimum ranking is about 4799, with a range of 4299-5299.

If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<4300), you can focus on reaching for Computer Science.
